heroImageAlt: Group of Dove Cottage supporters holding a fundraising banner in the countryside
heroShortDescription: Do it for Dove – every pound you raise helps local families receive compassionate hospice care.
introBody:
By fundraising for our hospice, you’re making a real difference in your community. Every pound you raise helps us provide compassionate care, comfort and support to patients and their loved ones when they need it most.

There are so many ways to get involved – whether you’re looking for a personal challenge, a social event, or a simple way to mark a special occasion.
sponsoredBody:
Looking for a reason to push yourself, try something new or achieve a personal goal? Sponsored challenges are a fantastic way to raise funds and awareness at the same time.

From walks, runs and cycles to skydives and endurance events, you can choose a challenge that suits your interests and abilities. Whether you take part in one of our organised challenges or sign up for your own, we’ll be here to support you every step of the way with fundraising tips, resources and encouragement.

Every mile covered and every challenge completed helps ensure our vital care can continue.
eventsBody:
Why not organise your own event and bring friends, family or colleagues together for a good cause?

From quiz nights, coffee mornings and bake sales to golf days, raffles or community events, there are endless ways to raise money while having fun. You can make it as big or as small as you like – every event makes a difference.

If you’d like advice or ideas, our team is always happy to help you plan your event and make it a success.
birthdayHeading: Celebrate Your Birthday with a Donation
birthdayBody:
Turn your birthday into something truly meaningful by asking for donations to the hospice instead of gifts.

By donating on your birthday, or setting up a birthday fundraising page, you can help support patients and families while celebrating another year of life. It’s a simple but powerful way to give back, and many people find it a wonderful way to mark a milestone or honour a loved one.
fundraiseYourWayBody:
However you choose to fundraise, your support means more than words can say. Together, we can ensure that our hospice continues to provide care, dignity and compassion to those who need it most.

If you’re ready to get started, or would like to talk through your ideas, please get in touch with our fundraising team – we’d love to support you on your fundraising journey.
contactCtaHeading: Tell us about your fundraising idea
contactCtaBody: Complete the contact form below to tell us about your idea and request a fundraising support pack.
